examples.text: خَتَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ سَمْعِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰٓ أَبْصَـٰرِهِمْ غِشَـٰوَةٌ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ
examples.english: Allah has sealed their hearts and their hearing, and their sight is covered. They will suffer a tremendous punishment.

senses.gloss: to put a signet-ring on someone's finger

etymology.text: From the root خ ت م (ḵ t m). Compare Egyptian ḫtm (“to seal”), Hebrew חתם (ħatám).
